title: Horizontal Locking ( HLock)
text: Horizontal Locking ( HLock) This property locks all displayed data to the left of, and including, the specified column. All columns to the right can be viewed by scrolling. HLock = " ColumnNumber " Example: Setting in ProcScript $entityproperties(ENT1) = "hlock=2" Copy Applies To egrid (Grid) Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
